title: Template Coherence Rule Schema
description: Declarative schema for rules in .claude/patterns/template-coherence-rules.json. Consumed by .claude/scripts/verify-linter.sh. Each rule type dispatches to a dedicated function that emits findings into the cross_file_contradiction category with structured {category, rule_type, message, severity} objects.

rule_field_role_map.description: Pre-AOC rule type: SCOPE consumers must call canonical_function; count-based regex forbidden.

rule_artifact_lifecycle.description: Pre-AOC rule type: VERIFY-referenced artifacts must have upstream produces declaration; do_not_modify[X] cannot precede produces[X].

rule_verdict_vocab_consistency.description: AOC v1 R1: per-agent verdict/result declarations must match registry.verdict_agents_schema; lib-verdict.sh predicates must reference only registry values.

agent_files_glob.description: Glob of agent definition files to scan for verdict emissions.

predicate_file.description: Path to lib-verdict.sh (scan for predicate verdict literals).

rule_ledger_ownership.description: AOC v1 R2: gated_paths are written only by allowed_writers. Runtime fix-ledger-write-guard.sh enforces at tool-invocation time; this rule catches template-level authorship.

rule_consumer_coverage.description: AOC v1 R3: every file in consumers[] must reference canonical_source as authoritative input. Regex on legacy source alone triggers a stale-consumer finding.
